---
title: "How to use the evolTree operation"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{How to use the evolTree operation}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

# The setup when you use the R4eGPS

When you use R4eGPS for the first time, configure the installed eGPS root or let the first JVM-backed call ask you to choose it.

```{r setup}
library(R4eGPS)
# R4eGPS::configureEGPSSourceRuntime(
#   repoRoot = "C:/Users/yudal/Documents/project/eGPS2/eGPS_v2.1_windows_x64_selfTest"
# )
```


# Quick function with the eGPS libraries
